description: A critical care quality team is reviewing intraoperative ventilatory management for evidence of lung-protective ventilation strategies. Using Vital Recorder and the recordings in C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\VitalRecorderData\ (0001.vital, 0002.vital, and 0003.vital), identify which case(s) include dynamic respiratory mechanics parameters, specifically lung compliance (COMPLIANCE track) and/or airway mechanics data such as mean airway pressure (MAWP_MBAR) or plateau pressure (PPLAT_MBAR). For the identified case(s), export the intraoperative segment—from the 'Surgery started' event to the 'Surgery finished' event—to a CSV file named C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\lung_protection_intraop.csv. Finally, produce a ventilation review report saved as C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\ventilation_review.txt documenting which cases contain respiratory mechanics parameters, the specific respiratory tracks available, the approximate duration of the intraoperative period, and a clinical assessment of whether the monitoring parameters are consistent with a lung-protective ventilation approach.
